3138230.name: Lap of the Gods: A Visual Novel
3138230.description:
There is something very wrong.

Or did you just misremember things?

-Explore the world of "The Lap" and see its idyllic sights and sounds through:

     --Over 100+ hand-drawn backgrounds.

-Take a journey through a strange land with some point-and-click elements, meeting a variety of odd, object-headed citizens as you investigate:
     --Accompanied by over 50+ hand-animated character sprites.

-Let a bizarre mystery unfold as you help Marion find a way of keeping her entire world from slipping between her hands.
